error_signature: data on the page does not refresh after updating
title: Page data not refreshing after record update
symptom: After updating a record in Xano, the data displayed on the page does not refresh until the page is reloaded or switched.
not_this_if: Data refreshes correctly without manual page reload
root_cause: The application does not automatically refresh the displayed data after an update because it relies on the initial data fetch without re-fetching the updated data from the server after the update action.
fix_steps: In the submit action, after updating the record, add a fetch action to retrieve the updated collection.
Ensure that the fetch action is correctly configured to get the latest data.
agent_instruction: Add a fetch action to retrieve the updated data after the record update.
